title: Quadrilateral
description: A quadrilateral is a 4-sided figure. For this program, print out a 4 sided figure using the capital letter X. The largest side will be 20, and the smallest side will be 1.
input: The first line consists of the number of data sets. Each data set consists of 2 integers, the length and width of the quadrilateral.
output: Print out the quadrilateral using the capital letter X, each quadrilateral separated by a blank line.

samples.output:
XX
XX
XX

XXXXX

XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX
XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX
XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX
XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX
XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX
XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX
XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX
XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX

source: School, PLU High School Programming Contest, PLU 2014, Advanced
